properties.displayName: Network connections to article IPs / domains
properties.description: Outbound traffic to attacker infrastructure named in the article.
properties.query:
let BadIPs     = dynamic([__IP_LIST__]);
let BadDomains = dynamic([__DOMAIN_LIST__]);
ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where DstIpAddr in (BadIPs)
   or Url has_any (BadDomains)
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber, Url, NetworkProtocol
| order by TimeGenerated desc
